codeReview.summary: The fix commit resolves the three prior blocking findings: McpHub now registers/unregisters sessions with PlatformToolsManager, session-init dynamic tools are tracked in dynamicToolHandles for removeTool cleanup, and required adapter SDK dependencies are present with explicit non-mock error paths.

issues.description: registerSession() applies preloaded integration tools through syncAllIntegrations(), but those handles are not stored in toolHandles; later deregisterIntegrationTools() only removes handles tracked from registerIntegrationTools(). If a session starts after an integration is already loaded, unload can leave stale integration tools on that session.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature metadata still references skillName 'worker' while project .factory/skills directory is empty, so skill invocation remains a known no-op/error path in worker sessions.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission features.json (f-fix-m2-scrutiny and f-fix-m2-scrutiny-2) use "skillName": "worker"; /Users/teodorwaltervido/Desktop/service/.factory/skills is empty.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission-local worker transcript index and handoff artifacts are incomplete for the reviewed fix session, requiring fallback to global session logs for transcript evidence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: No mission handoff file matched worker session 65cb0061-aeaa-48ce-8229-50c3080af97f in mission handoffs/, and mission worker-transcripts.jsonl had no match for that workerSessionId; transcript was reviewed from /Users/teodorwaltervido/.factory/sessions/-Users-teodorwaltervido/65cb0061-aeaa-48ce-8229-50c3080af97f.jsonl.

summary: Pass. This re-run fix adequately addresses all three prior blocking failures from f-fix-m2-scrutiny (session wiring for PlatformToolsManager, complete dynamic-tool handle cleanup in removeTool, and runtime SDK dependency/non-mock adapter behavior). One non-blocking lifecycle edge case remains in platform-tool deregistration for sessions created after an integration is already loaded.
